name: io.github.Gareth1953/agent-services-mcp
description: Thin MCP wrapper exposing content-provenance, quality-scoring and action-audit as 7 tools.

environmentVariables.name: PROVENANCE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the provenance-receipts service. Optional; defaults to the live workers.dev URL.

environmentVariables.name: QUALITY_GATE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the quality-gate service. Optional; defaults to the live workers.dev URL.

environmentVariables.name: AUDIT_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the agent-action-audit service. Optional; defaults to the live workers.dev URL.
